children.text: aquifer storage and recovery projects; or
water source substitution for aquifer protection projects.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: b Limitation
children.text: Nothing in this section authorizes additional technical or financial assistance for, or participation in an agreement for, a surface water storage facility to be constructed or expanded.

children.heading: Requirement
children.label: c Requirement
children.text: A construction project shall only be eligible for financial assistance under this section if the project meets the conditions for funding under .section 3202(a)(2)(C)(ii) of this title

children.heading: Cost sharing
children.label: d Cost sharing
children.text: Cost sharing for a project funded under this section shall be in accordance with .section 3202(b) of this title
the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.);42 U.S.C. 4321
any obligations for fish, wildlife, or water quality protection in permits or licenses granted by a Federal agency or a State; and
any applicable Federal or State laws (including regulations).

children.heading: Authorization by Congress for major project construction
children.label: f Authorization by Congress for major project construction
children.text: A project with a total estimated cost of $500,000,000 or more shall only be eligible for construction funding under this section if the project is authorized for construction by an Act of Congress.
